name: Chicken Breasts Amaretto from Loren Martin
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all of the stuffing ingredients together and pour into a greased baking dish.
2. Lay the chicken breasts on top of the mixture (or place under the stuffing mixture if desired for more moisture).
3. If placing the chicken breasts on top, baste them periodically with the glaze sauce.
4. To make the glaze sauce, combine all ingredients in a small heavy saucepan and heat slowly until the sugar dissolves.
5. Cool the glaze sauce and either baste the chicken breasts during cooking or serve as a topping glaze at the table.
